functions.label: attachmentToDashboardState
description:
Converts a DashboardAttachment to a DashboardState.
Uses provided values from the attachment, falling back to defaults for missing fields.

functions.label: fromEmbeddablePanel
description:
Converts an embeddable panel back to vis input format.
- Unwraps Lens config from `attributes` if present
signature: ({ type, config }: { type: string; uid: string; config: Record<string, unknown>; grid: { x: number; y: number; w: number; h: number; }; }) =>

children.label: { type, config }
signature: { type: string; uid: string; config: Record<string, unknown>; grid: { x: number; y: number; w: number; h: number; }; }

functions.label: isSection
signature: (widget: { type: string; uid: string; config: Record<string, unknown>; grid: { x: number; y: number; w: number; h: number; }; } | { uid: string; title: string; collapsed: boolean; grid: { y: number; }; panels: { type: string; uid: string; config: Record<string, unknown>; grid: { x: number; y: number; w: number; h: number; }; }[]; }) => widget is { uid: string; title: string; collapsed: boolean; grid: { y: number; }; panels: { type: string; uid: string; config: Record<string, unknown>; grid: { x: number; y: number; w: number; h: number; }; }[]; }

children.label: widget
signature: { type: string; uid: string; config: Record<string, unknown>; grid: { x: number; y: number; w: number; h: number; }; } | { uid: string; title: string; collapsed: boolean; grid: { y: number; }; panels: { type: string; uid: string; config: Record<string, unknown>; grid: { x: number; y: number; w: number; h: number; }; }[]; }

functions.label: toEmbeddablePanel
description:
Converts panel input to a full AttachmentPanel (embeddable format).
- Generates a uid if not provided
- Wraps Lens config in `attributes` if needed
signature: ) => { type: string; uid: string; config: Record<string, unknown>; grid: { x: number; y: number; w: number; h: number; }; }

misc.label: AttachmentPanel
signature: { type: string; uid: string; config: Record<string, unknown>; grid: { x: number; y: number; w: number; h: number; }; }

misc.label: DASHBOARD_ATTACHMENT_TYPE
description: Attachment type identifier for dashboard state

misc.label: DashboardAttachment
signature: <"platform.dashboard.dashboard_state", { title: string; panels: any[]; description?: string | undefined; query?: { query: any; language: string; } | undefined; time_range?: { from: string; to: string; mode: any; } | undefined; refresh_interval?: { pause: boolean; value: number; } | undefined; filters?: Record<string, unknown>[] | undefined; options?: { auto_apply_filters?: boolean | undefined; hide_panel_titles?: boolean | undefined; hide_panel_borders?: boolean | undefined; use_margins?: boolean | undefined; sync_colors?: boolean | undefined; sync_tooltips?: boolean | undefined; sync_cursor?: boolean | undefined; } | undefined; tags?: string[] | undefined; pinned_panels?: Record<string, unknown>[] | undefined; access_control?: { access_mode: any; } | undefined; project_routing?: string | undefined; }>

misc.label: DashboardAttachmentData
signature: { title: string; panels: any[]; description?: string | undefined; query?: { query: any; language: string; } | undefined; time_range?: { from: string; to: string; mode: any; } | undefined; refresh_interval?: { pause: boolean; value: number; } | undefined; filters?: Record<string, unknown>[] | undefined; options?: { auto_apply_filters?: boolean | undefined; hide_panel_titles?: boolean | undefined; hide_panel_borders?: boolean | undefined; use_margins?: boolean | undefined; sync_colors?: boolean | undefined; sync_tooltips?: boolean | undefined; sync_cursor?: boolean | undefined; } | undefined; tags?: string[] | undefined; pinned_panels?: Record<string, unknown>[] | undefined; access_control?: { access_mode: any; } | undefined; project_routing?: string | undefined; }

misc.label: DashboardPanelInput
description: Panel input that may or may not have a uid assigned yet
signature: Omit<{ type: string; uid: string; config: Record<string, unknown>; grid: { x: number; y: number; w: number; h: number; }; }, "uid"> & { uid?: string | undefined; }

misc.label: DashboardSection
signature: { uid: string; title: string; collapsed: boolean; grid: { y: number; }; panels: { type: string; uid: string; config: Record<string, unknown>; grid: { x: number; y: number; w: number; h: number; }; }[]; }

objects.label: attachmentPanelSchema
description:
Zod schema for dashboard panel entries.
The `type` field contains the actual embeddable type.

objects.label: dashboardAttachmentDataSchema
description:
Zod schema for dashboard attachment data.
This schema matches the structure of DashboardState from @kbn/dashboard-plugin.

objects.label: panelGridSchema
description:
Grid dimensions (in dashboard grid units) for layout.
Dashboard grid is 48 columns wide; height is in same units.
